pass: second — deep trivia harvest for Discrete Lair 001 bundle

trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3 (released 2024-06-14) is a 528-card 'draft innovation' set — Wizards' term for sets that inject Modern-legal cards directly without passing through Standard. The set combined over 70 keyword abilities; Bestow returning alongside Afterlife in the same card is a direct product of that mechanic-showcase philosophy.

Bestow debuted in Theros (September 2013) and had only rare reappearances (Commander 2018) in eleven years before MH3. When a fan noted its return, Mark Rosewater responded: 'Bestow is my favorite mechanic from OG Theros.' He rates it 6-7 on the Storm Scale, citing infrastructure requirements as the ceiling on return frequency.

Afterlife debuted as the Orzhov guild mechanic in Ravnica Allegiance (January 2019). Wizards' official mechanics article framed it around Syndicate debt-beyond-death: 'Just because someone's mortal form has diminished into disuse, the spirit within may be free to serve.' Indebted Spirit is the first card to carry both Afterlife and Bestow simultaneously.
sources: Wizards official article: 'Ravnica Allegiance Mechanics', magic.wizards.com, 2019

trivia_bullets.text: In MH3 draft, the WB Orzhov archetype is a 'modified grind' strategy that uses Bestow creatures as modification enablers feeding sacrifice and recursion payoffs. Draftsim's MH3 Limited Set Review called the card out by name: 'Bestowing Indebted Spirit looks absolutely silly. For 3 mana, you get a +1/+1 aura, a 1/1 creature and two 1/1 fliers thanks to afterlife.' Its EDHREC rank of 7,972 confirms it is a draft-role uncommon rather than a Commander staple.
sources: Draftsim: 'The Ultimate Modern Horizons 3 Limited Set Review'

trivia_bullets.text: Artist L.A. Draws (ArtStation: therealola.artstation.com) has a growing MTG card count spanning multiple sets. Confirmed credits include Blood Artist (Innistrad Remastered), Whirling Quicksand, Demonic Contract, Hate Mirage, The Phasing of Zhalfir, and Telling Time. No Hipsters of the Coast profile or published artist-statement interview was found in research as of 2026-05.

related_cards.note: 1-mana white Spirit with evasion and disruption; closest Modern-playable Spirit in the same cost and role slot

related_cards.name: Spirit of the Labyrinth
related_cards.note: White Spirit used in Modern Spirit-adjacent hate strategies; appears alongside WB Spirit token builds in community decklists

related_cards.name: Doomed Traveler
related_cards.note: 1-mana white creature that creates a 1/1 Spirit on death; Afterlife 1's direct mechanical ancestor and canonical token-on-death white staple

related_cards.name: Kaya's Guile
related_cards.note: Orzhov-colored instant generating flying Spirit tokens; core piece in WB Afterlife Modern lists alongside Afterlife creatures

research_notes.no_reddit_threads: Multiple search attempts found zero Reddit threads specific to this card.
research_notes.ghen_angle_dropped: Caller's suggested 'Ghen Arcanum Weaver pre-MH3 design inspiration' angle found no citable source — excluded per anti-confab rules.
research_notes.hythonia_ruling_history: Bestow ruling history covered via Theros origin + Rosewater Blogatog bullet. No Hythonia-specific ruling found that shaped later Bestow cards — a separate Hythonia bullet would require a primary source tying Hythonia to a clarification that influenced MH3 design.
research_notes.la_draws_full_card_count: ArtStation therealola confirmed via WebSearch snippet. Full Scryfall-enumerated card count not lockable (Bash permission denied this run); '29 cards' figure from search-result snippet treated as approximate.
research_notes.modern_competitive_viability: No tournament-result evidence found for this card in Modern sideboards or maindecks. EDHREC rank 7972 = low eternal-format footprint. Orzhov Tokens Modern archetype context cited instead as the closest citable framing.
